title: 4J Lite
description: A project inspired by Jacksthegreat's lite legacy
body:
# ABOUT THE MODPACK

**4J Lite uses Legacy4J and other mods to recreate a faithful version of console edition minecraft on Java edition**

# HOW TO INSTALL
### Modrinth (Recommended)
Simplist install method just download the version you want in a few clicks.
### Prism Launcher
If you would like more control in the setup you can use Prism Launcher go to the modrinth section and search 4J Lite
# FEATURES
### 4J Lite includes
- Better Performance
- Free Multiplayer
- Legacy Resource Packs
- Discord Rich Presence Intergration
- Tutorial Worlds
- A offical server in game (JWS)
# SPECIAL THANKS
JacksTheGreat.
## Developers
JavaBrew
## Playtesters
JavaBrew
# NOT FOR YOU
Try these
[Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by [omo50](https://modrinth.com/user/bowen)

[Lite Legacy](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lite-legacy)
